overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage following a large eagle flying through a lush forested valley along a winding river, gradually approaching a tall waterfall. The synthetic environment features dense green foliage, rocky terrain, and dynamic lighting typical of modern game engines.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest valley with narrow stream

agents.ego_description: flying steadily over a forest stream, navigating between dense tree canopies with wings spread wide

entered.detail: thick green tree cover forming a continuous canopy along the left side of the valley
narrow winding river flowing through the forest valley with visible rocks and shallow water
large moss-covered boulders scattered along the riverbank

segments.scene_description: The eagle glides through a dense forest valley, following a narrow stream below. Tall trees form a continuous green canopy on both sides with occasional rocky outcrops visible along the water's edge. The lighting is bright and natural, filtering through the leaves.

scene_state.functional_zone: widening river valley with approaching waterfall

events.description: waterfall becomes visible in the distance as the forest opens up

agents.ego_description: flying toward an opening in the valley where the landscape widens and a waterfall appears on the horizon

entered.detail: tall white waterfall cascading down a distant cliff face, becoming visible as the forest clears
rocky cliff formations rising above the tree line on the right side of the valley
open grassy slopes replacing dense forest on the left bank of the river

changed.to: sparse scattered trees on left only

segments.scene_description: The forest opens into a wider valley with grassy hillsides replacing dense tree cover. A tall waterfall becomes visible in the distance, framed by rocky cliffs. The river widens as the eagle approaches the falls, with the terrain becoming more rugged and exposed.

events.description: entering the rocky canyon area as the waterfall dominates the view ahead

agents.ego_description: flying closer to the waterfall, descending slightly as the canyon walls rise on both sides

entered.detail: tall vertical rock face forming the left boundary of the canyon approach
steep rocky cliff on the right side with sparse vegetation
deep pool of water at the base of the waterfall where the river widens significantly

changed.to: center_near dominant feature filling the frame
enclosing canyon walls on both sides

segments.scene_description: The eagle enters a narrow rocky canyon with steep cliff walls rising on both sides. The waterfall now dominates the view ahead, cascading down the rock face into a wide pool below. The forest gives way to bare rock and sparse vegetation as the camera approaches the falls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as an eagle glides from a sheltered forest valley into a rugged, open canyon dominated by a massive waterfall. It begins by weaving through a dense green canopy, following a narrow stream flanked by tall trees and occasional rocky outcrops. As the forest opens, the scene shifts to wider grassy hillsides and a broadening river, bringing a distant waterfall into view between towering cliffs. The camera then enters a narrow rocky canyon where steep walls rise on both sides, replacing the lush foliage with bare stone and sparse vegetation. Finally, the view expands to reveal the waterfall cascading down the rock face into a wide pool directly ahead.
